name: jig-typescript
description: TypeScript, React hooks, component API, and type-system review skills.

interface.longDescription: TypeScript-focused Codex skills for behavior-preserving simplification, type-system review, React hooks/effects lifecycle review, and React component/hook API review across type safety, API shape, render purity, dependency correctness, reusable UI contracts, prop modeling, cleanup, and stale closures.
defaultPrompt: Review the TypeScript types in this diff
Review React hooks and effects in this diff
Review React component and hook APIs in this diff
